summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CapyMatch Pipeline page UI refactor. All 15 features tested successfully. Layout hierarchy verified: Header → Hero Card → Momentum Insight → Priority Board (WHAT TO DO NEXT) → Pipeline List. Priority Board sections correctly labeled as ACT NOW (red), KEEP MOMENTUM (orange), MONITOR (green/collapsible). Font consistency verified - Inter for body, Manrope for headings, no inline fontFamily overrides to SF Pro or system fonts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page UI refactor is complete and working. All visual elements, interactions, and navigation flows verified. Priority Board uses new labels: ACT NOW / KEEP MOMENTUM / MONITOR. Fonts inherit from index.css (Inter + Manrope).

verified_features.1_pipeline_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /pipeline without errors after athlete login
verified_features.2_layout_hierarchy: PASS - Header → Hero Card → Momentum Insight → Priority Board → Pipeline List
verified_features.3_header_with_counts: PASS - 'Your recruiting right now' with '3 needs attention · 1 gaining momentum · 1 steady'
verified_features.4_priority_board_section_title: PASS - 'WHAT TO DO NEXT' section title found
verified_features.5_act_now_section: PASS - ACT NOW section with red dot indicator (#ef4444), 3 high-priority items
verified_features.6_keep_momentum_section: PASS - KEEP MOMENTUM section with orange dot indicator (#f59e0b), 1 medium-priority item
verified_features.7_monitor_section: PASS - MONITOR section with green dot indicator (#10b981), collapsible, 1 low-priority item
verified_features.8_act_now_card_elements: PASS - Each card has: school name, timing badge, reason text, action text, View CTA button
verified_features.9_keep_momentum_card_elements: PASS - Each card has: school name, timing badge, reason text, action text, View School CTA button
verified_features.10_monitor_row_elements: PASS - Compact rows with school name (Creighton University), stage (Visit), 'On track' status
verified_features.11_font_consistency_body: PASS - Body uses Inter font (verified via computed style)
verified_features.12_font_consistency_headings: PASS - Headings use Manrope font (verified via computed style)
verified_features.13_no_inline_font_overrides: PASS - No inline fontFamily overrides to SF Pro or system fonts in pipeline components
verified_features.14_hero_card_elements: PASS - Dark gradient, school name (Emory University), badges (NEEDS ATTENTION, OVERDUE 4D, WHY THIS SURFACED), progress rail, CTAs (View School, Why this?)
verified_features.15_momentum_insight_elements: PASS - White card with pills (3 gaining momentum, 3 needs attention, 1 steady), 'View full breakdown' link
verified_features.16_pipeline_list_elements: PASS - 'ALL PROGRAMS' section with 5 program rows, stages, progress bars, next steps
verified_features.17_card_navigation: PASS - Cards are clickable and navigate to individual school pages (/pipeline/{program_id})

accent_colors.act_now_red: rgb(239, 68, 68) / #ef4444 - Confirmed on ACT NOW card border-left
accent_colors.keep_momentum_orange: rgb(245, 158, 11) / #f59e0b - Confirmed on KEEP MOMENTUM card border-left
accent_colors.monitor_green: #10b981 - Green dot indicator in MONITOR section

hero_card.elements: School name, match score, badges, progress rail, CTAs

design_verification.white_cards: Momentum Insight and Priority Board cards use white background (#fff)

testing_notes.login_method: Click Emma Chen (Athlete) row, fill password, press Enter
testing_notes.navigation: After login redirects to /board, navigate to /pipeline
testing_notes.data_state: 5 programs: Emory (high/overdue), Stanford (high), Florida (high), UCLA (medium), Creighton (low/on-track)
